positive: A symmetrical, centered, highly detailed mandala pattern composed of stylized cosmic flora and celestial elements. The design features intricate bioluminescent flowers, crescent moons, and nebulae rendered with a strong graphic, clean silhouette. The style must blend detailed botanical illustration with abstract cosmic art, utilizing sharp, clean linework and strong, contrasting color pops of teal, violet, and electric blue against a deep midnight navy background. High contrast, central composition, flat graphic design aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
